texto: Evil devastates any possibility of an intellectual response
autor: the tools of the rational intellect are as helpless incoping with the aftereffects of evil as it was in preventing it.
explicacao: Citação de the tools of the rational intellect are as helpless incoping with the aftereffects of evil as it was in preventing it. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Evil devastates any possibility of an intellectual response” articula reflexao, paul-levy, dispelling-wetiko em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dispelling-wetiko.
